_readme: Single source of truth for all fund NAV history. Both manual entries and the scraper write here. Each fund has a 'source' field ('manual' or 'scrape') and a 'history' array of {date, nav} points sorted oldest-first. Dates are ISO YYYY-MM-DD. NAV is a number (RM per unit).

funds.name: Amanah Saham Nasional
funds.note: ASNB robots.txt disallows automated access — must be entered manually from myASNB / asnb.com.my.

funds.name: Amanah Saham Malaysia (Fixed)
funds.note: Fixed price RM1.00. Track annual distribution instead of NAV.
